name: Jordan Overstreet
subject: Fwd: Mike has something to say (the hearings yesterday)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I wanted to resend Mike's video on the impeachment proceedings, team. Watch it here. He's our best hope to bring leadership and change back to the Senate -- who better to stand up for
|
---
| |
---

| | I wanted to resend Mike's video on the impeachment proceedings, team. **[Watch it here.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b8852/350972632/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191124_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5")** He's our best hope to bring leadership and change back to the Senate -- who better to stand up for Iowa than a three-star admiral? _**But we need your help to keep our ad up and running online so everyone knows who Iowa can trust with having our back.**_ [**Click here to watch it, and chip in $5 to help us reach another 100 voters.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b8852/350972632/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191124_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5") Democratically Yours, Jordan

\--------Forwarded Message--------
From: Team Franken
Subject: Fwd: Mike has something to say (the hearings yesterday)
Sent: Thursday, November 21st, 2019 Big news, team. Mike just released his thoughts on impeachment in a new digital ad. But we need your help to keep it up and running online. [**Click here to watch it, and chip in $5 to help us reach another 100 voters.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b8853/350972632/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191124_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5") [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b886c/350972632/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191124_em_fr_jo_b1_all") Mike is **__the__** leader in this race, folks. He was the first to support the impeachment hearings, because he has the courage to speak against clear wrongdoing -- unlike his opponent -- who remains shamefully silent. Iowans deserve a senator like Admiral Mike Franken, a person who has maintained a security clearance for over 40 years, served over 36 years in the Navy, and knows how diplomacy is supposed to work. He speaks clearly about the Ukraine imbroglio just like he will act on what is best for Iowa and our nation. **Let 's keep this ad running and pressure Sen. Joni Ernst to finally do what's right, then let's bring some dignity back to Washington by voting in Admiral Michael Franken. [Can you chip in $5 to help us reach another 100 voters?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b8852/350972632/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitalad_imp?refcode=20191124_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5")** Thank you, Team Franken
---

---

[Contribute](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2421/33365068/4a6312d5/3f8b886d/350972632/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=em_footer")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d8/3eb3e2fc/5792dfb4/744d4946/189216044/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d8/3eb3e2fc/5792dfb4/744d4945/189216044/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d8/3eb3e2fc/5792dfb4/744d4944/189216044/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Time is running out. We only have a few hours left to reach our $20,000 Pre-Thanksgiving Goal! If you **[rush a donation](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909bd/7f51f7bc/4b822434/4ef09d3c/3395241968/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.3nd__557__&amount=10&recurring=true")** right now, you'll be helping us:

name: Team Tina
subject: back-to-back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We built a winning campaign in 2018 because of the support we received from folks like you. And now, we're asking you to help us do it all over again.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191124-back?refcode=em191124-back&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hey there --

Here's why fundraising deadlines (_like the one coming up this week!_) are so critical to the success of our campaign and why we need to hit every single goal we set for ourselves before the new year:

**Tina _just_ won her special election in November 2018 and now, she's running again** -- making her the only Senate Democrat running back-to-back like this in a must-win seat to flip the majority.

Last year, we were able to build a winning campaign because of the support we received from folks like you. And now, we're asking you to help us do it all over again.

**Rush a donation of $10 (or more!) before our end-of-month deadline to help Tina win her re-election in 2020 and keep Minnesota blue. This incredible grassroots team brought us to victory once before, and it can get us over the finish line again. Donate now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191124-back?refcode=em191124-back&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Emily Reagan
subject: Jack Wyman Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jack Wyman for Congress
body:
View this email in your browser<https://mailchi.mp/d383bdcd2fbf/jack-wyman-campaign-update?e=bf489127c6>
[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/36811b11-2522-4014-be9b-78f2be5ac599.png]
Join Me at a Faith Forum!

In the first week of December, my campaign will hold three Faith Forums at churches across the district. These forums are an opportunity to speak with constituents about the importance of faith in public life and the relationship between religion, politics, and public policy. Most importantly, I want to listen and learn what you, the people, think about the important issues facing our state and nation. So many of our most pressing issues are moral issues, and we need courageous leadership on questions such as life, religious liberty, parental rights, and sound fiscal policy. Join us and be part of the conversation.

[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/8e091513-1b93-411e-94de-198e81a3759a.png]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=242ff620ba&e=bf489127c6>
December 2nd: Grace Baptist Church, Flower Mound

[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/f13f6e9f-c4ed-4caf-ab4b-e2738d7ccb48.png]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=6a74f6339e&e=bf489127c6>
December 3rd: The Church at Trophy Lakes, Trophy Club

[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/cf631f2c-2656-43e6-b70a-26a3563c3e5f.jpg]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=0da3133dd7&e=bf489127c6>
December 5th: Lifeline Church, Denton

[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/b1226594-c910-4059-a5c7-947387ae519c.png]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=2cdab7eed7&e=bf489127c6>
“A breath of fresh air that cuts through the smell of RINOs.”

I recently spoke with Doc Greene on his nationally syndicated talk show, Right Side of the Mic. We covered a lot of ground, including my opponent’s support of the liberal agenda to lower the voting age to 16 and his co-sponsorship of a dangerous red flag bill. Following the interview, I was honored to receive this endorsement from Doc Greene: “I can assure all you in in CD 26 that Jack Wyman is a Real Republican. A breath of fresh air that cuts through the smell of RINOs. Vote Wyman for Congress in CD 26.” I invite you to listen and share the recording!
[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/111f0a82-855b-4ef4-8673-60e4c769dc54.gif]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=d6658a5ad2&e=bf489127c6>
Volunteer Training in December

Thanks to everyone who has signed on to volunteer with Team Wyman! The next few months are critical as we approach the primary election on March 3. We will have teams block walking to share about the campaign, and we need your help. We will hold a volunteer training on Saturday, Dec. 14 at Northview Baptist Church in Lewisville. To participate, please sign up HERE!<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=7b18c2c796&e=bf489127c6>
[https://gallery.mailchimp.com/b7da279d3ff003820c324b066/images/00114165-ed3e-4360-aa30-21e87fd9fd40.jpg]

Defending the President

Instead of actually governing and doing their jobs, Congress has launched pointless impeachment proceedings against the president that we elected. Make no mistake, they know that nothing will come from this and they are doing it for political purposes. When you elect me to congress I will fight these pointless charades and help President Trump as he continues to KEEP AMERICA GREAT!
Can you give $5, $25, or $50 to help me finish November strong?
Click here to donate—every gift counts!<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=4b521024d5&e=bf489127c6>
[Facebook]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=f89ec2c654&e=bf489127c6>
[Website]<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=accb34395c&e=bf489127c6>

Copyright © 2019 Jack Wyman for Congress, All rights reserved.

Our mailing address is:
PO BOX 52399, DENTON, TX 76206

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can update your preferences<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=7bb7c1a886&e=bf489127c6> or unsubscribe from this list<https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=7bb7c1a886&e=bf489127c6&c=286fc7339f>.

name: Zach Graumann
subject: December debate qualification status: NOT YET QUALIFIED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Here’s what we know

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom) **December debate qualification status:
NOT YET QUALIFIED**

✅ 200,000 unique donors
✅ Poll 1: CNN New Hampshire
✅ Poll 2: Quinnipiac New Hampshire
✅ Poll 3: Quinnipiac South Carolina
**❌ Poll 4: National or Early State Poll**

[Pitch in now and help us qualify for the final debate of 2019!](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=5&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom) | [PITCH IN](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=13&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
Yang Gang --

**Here’s what we know:** After each debate, our fundraising goes through the roof. Our poll numbers shoot up. Search traffic for our campaign spikes -- both nationally and in the early primary states.

**But, but, but:** When we’re out of the news for an extended period of time, things start to slow down. Our poll numbers sag. Our fundraising dries up.

To recapture our momentum, we need to qualify for the December debate. To do so, we need to reach 4% support in one more poll.

**Our gameplan:** We’re spending big in Iowa and New Hampshire with ads targeting undecided voters and folks who are just starting to tune into the 2020 race. **But frankly it’s expensive.** And we’re competing with candidates with unlimited funds.

**[We need your help: Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us keep our ads on the air and ensure we qualify for the final debate of 2019?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=12&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=6&amount=25&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---
We have the grassroots support needed to go the distance in this race. But we can’t go all the way if we don’t hit every milestone in between. This debate is the next milestone. And we’re running out of time.

**Donate now:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/december-debate](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=15)**

Thanks so much for your help,

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Pitch IN](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17705?t=14&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3529%2E377263%2ENOHOom) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Cory Booker
subject: Lived experiences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
If you tuned into this week's debate, you heard me speak to how the experiences I've had throughout my life inform the policies I fight for every single day as a senator and as a presidential candidat
| | |
---
| _During last week 's debate, Cory spoke to his lived experiences and how they differentiate him in the field. Read about some of these experiences below, then please consider **[chipping in a few dollars to send him all the way to the White House.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_CB_20191124-fr-CB-experience-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Friend, If you tuned into this week's debate, you heard me speak to how the experiences I've had throughout my life inform the policies I fight for every single day as a senator and as a presidential candidate. But it's hard to say everything I'd like to in 75-seconds or less on a debate stage, so I'd like to take a few minutes here to share some of the moments that helped shape me. After I graduated from law school, my father asked me what I wanted to do with my life. He said to me, _" Son, you got more degrees than the month of July, but you're not hot."_ He noted that it's not how many degrees you have that matters, but rather how you use them to help people. I chose to pay it forward. I had moved to a low-income neighborhood in Newark, New Jersey, a city I still call home today. I provided free legal services for families who couldn't afford it as a tenants' rights lawyer. I learned that despite all of our very real differences as Americans, we share common interests, a common cause, and a common destiny. That we cannot just listen to each other, we must see each other in order to understand each other. During my time on the Newark Municipal Council, I saw how the power of the people is greater than the people in power. I learned that legislating demands you have a working relationship with your colleagues. That no matter how much you disagree with them, you must seek common ground if you want to get things done that make people's lives better. When I was elected mayor of Newark in 2006, I took these lessons with me. For more than seven years, I fought for a city that had gone decades with far too little national attention and investment. A city of incredible people and beauty, but with a government that had long failed to serve it. And I led that same city through a recession that had drastic effects on communities across the country. And in 2013, I was elected to be the first African-American to ever represent New Jersey in the Senate, and only the fourth popularly elected African-American to serve in the Senate in our nation's history. I went right to work to bring people together to accomplish things many said were impossible. I've helped lead the passage of landmark criminal justice reform legislation, and have been on the front line of efforts to increase wages, expand economic opportunity, and protect the rights of all Americans to breathe clean air and drink clean water. **I 'm reminded of these milestones every day on the campaign trail, and I couldn't be more thankful for the road I traveled and the experiences that continue to shape my policy agenda today -- the same lived experiences I'll bring to the Oval Office as president.** **[If you're with me in this fight, please consider chipping in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_CB_20191124-fr-CB-experience-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_CB_20191124-fr-CB-experience-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

---

clean_body: If you tuned into this week's debate, you heard me speak to how the experiences I've had throughout my life inform the policies I fight for every single day as a senator and as a presidential candidat | | | | During last week 's debate, Cory spoke to his lived experiences and how they differentiate him in the field. Read about some of these experiences below, then please consider "=" Friend, If you tuned into this week's debate, you heard me speak to how the experiences I've had throughout my life inform the policies I fight for every single day as a senator and as a presidential candidate. But it's hard to say everything I'd like to in 75-seconds or less on a debate stage, so I'd like to take a few minutes here to share some of the moments that helped shape me. After I graduated from law school, my father asked me what I wanted to do with my life. He said to me, " Son, you got more degrees than the month of July, but you're not hot." He noted that it's not how many degrees you have that matters, but rather how you use them to help people. I chose to pay it forward. I had moved to a low-income neighborhood in Newark, New Jersey, a city I still call home today. I provided free legal services for families who couldn't afford it as a tenants' rights lawyer. I learned that despite all of our very real differences as Americans, we share common interests, a common cause, and a common destiny. That we cannot just listen to each other, we must see each other in order to understand each other. During my time on the Newark Municipal Council, I saw how the power of the people is greater than the people in power. I learned that legislating demands you have a working relationship with your colleagues. That no matter how much you disagree with them, you must seek common ground if you want to get things done that make people's lives better. When I was elected mayor of Newark in 2006, I took these lessons with me. For more than seven years, I fought for a city that had gone decades with far too little national attention and investment. A city of incredible people and beauty, but with a government that had long failed to serve it. And I led that same city through a recession that had drastic effects on communities across the country. And in 2013, I was elected to be the first African-American to ever represent New Jersey in the Senate, and only the fourth popularly elected African-American to serve in the Senate in our nation's history. I went right to work to bring people together to accomplish things many said were impossible. I've helped lead the passage of landmark criminal justice reform legislation, and have been on the front line of efforts to increase wages, expand economic opportunity, and protect the rights of all Americans to breathe clean air and drink clean water. I 'm reminded of these milestones every day on the campaign trail, and I couldn't be more thankful for the road I traveled and the experiences that continue to shape my policy agenda today -- the same lived experiences I'll bring to the Oval Office as president. "=" Thanks, Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. name: Christina Finello
subject: Hey Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
We fell $562 short of our November goal on Friday.

Getting into this race, DC insiders told me how much I needed to be able to raise from my network \-- and lately, we’ve just been falling flat.

I got into this race because after seeing our current congressman vote in favor of the big corporations powering his re-election while dodging and ducking the people who voted to elect him, I knew I had to fight for better representation. That’s why I ran \-- but I don’t have a personal network of millionaires ready to power my campaign.

I have YOU, my wonderful friends, colleagues, family members, and supporters who work hard for every dollar we have and know as well as I do that we HAVE to unseat Brian Fitzpatrick.

Peter, we can’t win if we fall short.

So this weekend I rounded up a few of my strongest supporters and made a BIG ask of them so you can know your contribution will have a longer lasting impact on my race. They agreed to match every contribution that comes in between right now and 11:59 PM ET.

I’m asking you: please make your first contribution to my people-funded campaign. Any amount will help. Even $10.

Here’s the link to give to have your donation doubled: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress-match-nd**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12208554/125348797/-1689084958?refcode=CFN20191125a.ND&refcode2=drdVeSlAX3VixX16bICY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWU3MzgzOC05MjBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMY-QtzpYfGLnCyklSP9IzFHz2qkTpSA941AAVibZGk=)

Thank you,
Christina

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Join me in building citizen leaders
body:
Carly Fiorina

As conservatives, we know that problem-solving isn't happening
in the bureaucracy of big government, and that the people closest
to a problem are best able to solve that problem.

Friends,

As conservatives, we know that problem-solving
isn't happening in the bureaucracy of big government, and that
the people closest to a problem are best able to solve that
problem.

This holiday season, I'm proud to be supporting
Unlocking Potential, a non-profit that is committed to building
citizen leaders. UP invests in the heroes who serve our veterans,
students, and the disabled every day - and who don't get a chance
to focus on their own development. Will you join me?

I'm all in. In fact, I'm so committed to this cause
that I'm offering a 10:1 match for every dollar donated. Will you
consider making a contribution?

Your gift means so much to me. I hope you will
continue to support me in my efforts of building leaders and
problem-solvers. If you cannot make a gift today, consider
joining our volunteer Network and donating your time in the
coming year.

Together we can unlock potential in our
communities.

Sincerely,

Carly Fiorina

Chairman, Unlocking Potential Foundation

Hey there! You joined us on March 22, 2019.

Want to Unsubscribe? No problem. We understand.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com

name: Dean Browning
subject: The Partisan Impeachment Inquiry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I do not want to take too much of your time, but I felt it was important to send you an update on the ongoing partisan impeachment inquiry that is eroding our democratic process.
The Democrat's narrative continues to fall short testimony after testimony for the simple reason that President Donald Trump did nothing wrong.
However, Representative Adam Schiff and his allies, including Rep. Susan Wild, continue to spread lies and fake news with the hope of getting our democratically elected President impeached.
It is clear what is happening. Democrats are afraid of losing in 2020. name: Mary Mancini
subject: A Thanksgiving Thank You, #MoscowMarsha, Unspent TANF, & Holiday Recipes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218636/125434088/-1362459248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892) |
---|---
Dear Peter, This week we gather with loved ones to celebrate a uniquely American tradition: Thanksgiving. It's a time of celebration and gratitude, when we reflect on what - and who - we are truly thankful for. Here’s our list:
1. **YOU**

Throughout the year, you work tirelessly for a better Tennessee for every Tennessean. You vote, donate and organize. You register voters. You knock on doors, make phone calls, and write postcards. You run for office, work for candidates, and win elections. You stand up for _real_ Tennessee values clearly and unequivocally: _Every Tennessean - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray - should have the opportunity to reach your full potential and live your best life._ Everyday, you are out there on the front lines working for...
* An honest and unbigoted government that prioritizes the well-being of its people and works for the [“peace, safety, and happiness”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218637/125434089/1323134282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892) of all.
* The health, safety, and welfare of our Veterans and those currently serving in our military & their families.
* Health care and an emergency room close by for all.
* A fully funded and supported public education that fits every Tennessean’s vision for a better future.
* A full-time job for everyone that pays a living wage so every Tennessean can work hard and support and spend quality time with their family.
* A secure and dignified retirement for all.
* Those who have fled to this country for a safe community to live in and opportunity for their children.

As you gather with loved ones this week, know that you are celebrated and appreciated. There _IS_ one more thing on our list. We are thankful you have given us the honor and opportunity to work with and serve Democrats all across the state. Here’s to a healthy and happy Thanksgiving..._for all._ Love, Mary, Kris, Maria, Evan & Sandra
Your Tennessee Democratic Party

* * *
#
# #MOSCOWMARSHA
Lt.Col. Vindman, a veteran who fought for our freedom and was wounded while doing so, devoted his life to this country and spent his career protecting our national security. He is a great American. Last week, he appeared before Congress in the ongoing impeachment inquiry of President Donald Trump and told the truth: President Trump withheld financial aid to an ally while pressuring the leader of the fledging democracy to investigate his political rival. Tennessee Republican Senator Marsha Blackburn, who has never served a day in the military, didn't like that Vindman was alarmed by Trump ["withholding financial aid while pressuring a foreign leader to investigate a political rival](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218638/125434090/196075463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892)." In an unpatriotic smear of a military hero, she labeled him “Vindictive Vindman" and then doubled down on denigrating him on a later Fox News appearance. There is no doubt Blackburn is cozy with Russia.

# A GOVERNMENT FOR PEACE, SAFETY &
# HAPPINESS
_“That all power is inherent in the people, and all free governments are founded on their authority, and instituted for their peace, safety, and happiness..."_ The Constitution of the State of Tennessee The [Tennessean](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218641/125434093/953376675?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892) asked the people of Grundy County if the Republican-led state government iwas working for them. They answered a resounding "NO." Grundy County is one of Tennessee's poorest counties. To them, [$732 million in unspent Temporary Assistance for Needy Families funds (the highest in the nation) that is supposed to help lift struggling families out of poverty "stings."](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218642/125434094/953376675?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892) Temporary Assistance for Needy Families, also known as TANF funds, are our tax dollars we send to Washington that could come back to help our friends and neighbors struggling with housing and childcare. Other states used their TANF money, [to combat opioid crisis and subsidize child care](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218643/125434095/-290516845?utm_source=oembed&utm_medium=onsite&utm_campaign=storylines&utm_content=news&utm_term=2497760001&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892). We just let ours gather dust. Governor Bill Lee defended the decision "to stockpile $732 million in federal anti-poverty funds reserved for families with children, saying the money would be put to use 'when the needs are there.'" Ask Tennessee families in Grundy or any of the other 38 counties in our state that are [in the lower 25 percent of joblessness and poverty](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12218644/125434096/-2024816174?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk4NjhmYi1iNDBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HlAO1rioFjjWMQfLiYN9yFSV9rW5kmjAMzGrVi-PBpw=&emci=a387c964-0a0e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=639868fb-b40f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6362892) and they'll tell you THERE IMMEDIATE ARE NEEDS.

# A SPECIAL ELECTION FOR TENNESSEE
# STATE HOUSE 77 AND YOU CAN HELP
On Thursday, December 19, voters in Tennessee State House District 77 (Dyer, Lake, and part of Obion County) will go to the polls in a special election to fill a vacant seat. Democratic candidate Mike Smith is ready to fight for the voters of District 77 because **he believes the rural way of life is worth fighting for.** He believes that the people of West Tennessee have a right to their roots, a quality public education, and affordable healthcare. Mike Smith knows that it's time beyond time for a state rep in West Tennessee who will listen more than he talks and will work across the aisle to solve problems instead of always blaming others. Mike will never engage in bullying or name calling, but instead will spend his time addressing the challenges that face West Tennessee. This special election is all about turnout and it will take many conversations with voters to let voters know when and where they can vote. HELP ELECT MIKE SMITH! The TNDP has set up a virtual phone bank so that you can help to GET OUT THE VOTE from anywhere in the state (or the country!).

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, This week we gather with loved ones to celebrate a uniquely American tradition: Thanksgiving. It's a time of celebration and gratitude, when we reflect on what - and who - we are truly thankful for. Here’s our list: 1. YOU Throughout the year, you work tirelessly for a better Tennessee for every Tennessean. You vote, donate and organize. You register voters. You knock on doors, make phone calls, and write postcards. You run for office, work for candidates, and win elections. You stand up for real Tennessee values clearly and unequivocally: Every Tennessean - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray - should have the opportunity to reach your full potential and live your best life. Everyday, you are out there on the front lines working for... An honest and unbigoted government that prioritizes the well-being of its people and works for the of all. The health, safety, and welfare of our Veterans and those currently serving in our military & their families. Health care and an emergency room close by for all. A fully funded and supported public education that fits every Tennessean’s vision for a better future. A full-time job for everyone that pays a living wage so every Tennessean can work hard and support and spend quality time with their family. A secure and dignified retirement for all. Those who have fled to this country for a safe community to live in and opportunity for their children. As you gather with loved ones this week, know that you are celebrated and appreciated. There IS one more thing on our list. We are thankful you have given us the honor and opportunity to work with and serve Democrats all across the state. Here’s to a healthy and happy Thanksgiving...for all. Love, Mary, Kris, Maria, Evan & Sandra Your Tennessee Democratic Party #MOSCOWMARSHA Lt.Col. Vindman, a veteran who fought for our freedom and was wounded while doing so, devoted his life to this country and spent his career protecting our national security. He is a great American. Last week, he appeared before Congress in the ongoing impeachment inquiry of President Donald Trump and told the truth: President Trump withheld financial aid to an ally while pressuring the leader of the fledging democracy to investigate his political rival. Tennessee Republican Senator Marsha Blackburn, who has never served a day in the military, didn't like that Vindman was alarmed by Trump ." In an unpatriotic smear of a military hero, she labeled him “Vindictive Vindman" and then doubled down on denigrating him on a later Fox News appearance. There is no doubt Blackburn is cozy with Russia. In 2011, Tennessee attorney and Blackburn's Campaign Finance Chairman and president of Marsha Blackburn for Congress, Inc., G. Kline Preston IV, introduced the National Rifle Association (NRA) leadership to Russian officials, . Sen. Marsha Blackburn . Marsha Blackburn is defending President Trump by attacking a veteran and a war hero. She is also elevating the priorities of her donors and a foreign government over those of the people and the country she has sworn an oath to protect, represent, and prioritize above all others. Extortion is extortion and bribery is bribery. Our president has asked for foriegn interference in our elections in exchange for military aid. We need leadership in Tennessee that will stand up for the heroes who keep American elections free, fair, and safe – Sen. Blackburn prefers to mock them. The corruption and treachery of the GOP cannot be tolerated. The men and women of our great military put their lives on the line every day to protect our freedom. Marsha Blackburn’s treatment of Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman is not only disrespectful, it’s unpatriotic. By repeating a false Russian narrative and denigrating Lt. Colonel Vindman, Sen. Blackburn has become a co-conspirator in Donald Trump's crimes against the United States. It's no wonder why in Tennessee we're hearing, "I didn't leave the Republican Party, the Republican Party left me." We look forward to the future and the honest, courteous, and respectful GOP of days past. A GOVERNMENT FOR PEACE, SAFETY & HAPPINESS “That all power is inherent in the people, and all free governments are founded on their authority, and instituted for their peace, safety, and happiness..." The Constitution of the State of Tennessee The asked the people of Grundy County if the Republican-led state government iwas working for them. They answered a resounding "NO." Grundy County is one of Tennessee's poorest counties. To them, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families, also known as TANF funds, are our tax dollars we send to Washington that could come back to help our friends and neighbors struggling with housing and childcare. Other states used their TANF money, . We just let ours gather dust. Governor Bill Lee defended the decision "to stockpile $732 million in federal anti-poverty funds reserved for families with children, saying the money would be put to use 'when the needs are there.'" Ask Tennessee families in Grundy or any of the other 38 counties in our state that are and they'll tell you THERE IMMEDIATE ARE NEEDS. A SPECIAL ELECTION FOR TENNESSEE STATE HOUSE 77 AND YOU CAN HELP On Thursday, December 19, voters in Tennessee State House District 77 (Dyer, Lake, and part of Obion County) will go to the polls in a special election to fill a vacant seat. Democratic candidate Mike Smith is ready to fight for the voters of District 77 because he believes the rural way of life is worth fighting for. He believes that the people of West Tennessee have a right to their roots, a quality public education, and affordable healthcare. Mike Smith knows that it's time beyond time for a state rep in West Tennessee who will listen more than he talks and will work across the aisle to solve problems instead of always blaming others. Mike will never engage in bullying or name calling, but instead will spend his time addressing the challenges that face West Tennessee. This special election is all about turnout and it will take many conversations with voters to let voters know when and where they can vote. HELP ELECT MIKE SMITH! The TNDP has set up a virtual phone bank so that you can help to GET OUT THE VOTE from anywhere in the state (or the country!). It's so easy. Virtual Phone Bank instructions can be found . Access the virtual phone bank . If you are interested in canvassing and phone banking in the district or would like to make a donation, contact campaign manager: Deane Arganbright at mailto:argandeane@yahoo.com or 731-588-0681. IMPEACHMENT...PIE? Peaches aren't exactly in season so serving an imPEACH ment pie with peaches on Thanksgiving, either with or without the other guests knowing exaclty what's going on (Hey, Uncle Bud), is a little tricky. So, we found you some alternatives. COOKIES! For those who want everyone in on the fun, here's a recipe for . Buy a tiny hand cookie cutter , cover with , and there you have it: delicious tiny orange hand cookies. They go great with covfefe. PIE! For those who want the fun to be more of a "cover-up," here's a new twist on an old classic: . Hershey's calls it "Not Your Grandma's Pumpkin Pie," but you'll know it's an ImpeachMINT Pie. Have FUN! NOSTALGIA! And, for those of you who long for the good ol' days, here's the recipe for . Happy Thanksgiving! ELECTION NEWS: 343 DAYS TO GO “Abrams delivered her remarks as she kicked off a panel discussion about voter suppression across the country and in Georgia and its disproportionate impact on disabled voters and non-white voters. ... That was the focus of the panel discussion, moderated by the Democratic Party of Georgia’s Saira Draper and Andrea S. Young with the Democratic National Committee.” DNC RURAL ROUNDUP: The DNC Rural Political Director sent out the first ever , where you'll find information about rural results from the 2019 elections, DNC rural events and helpful info that may help you organize in your communities. Also, we're taking it local. Click here to join the . NEWS FROM THE TENNESSEE AFL-CIO: The Central Labor Council of Memphis and West Tennessee will be putting together holiday food boxes on Thursday, December 19th beginning at 8:00 a.m. at AFSCME Local 1733 in Memphis and is looking for volunteers to help do so. Recipients and/or donations must be submitted by Monday, December 9th, and . We thank the Memphis and West Tennessee CLC for organizing such a thoughtful event and are confident that working families who are in need will be able to have a joyous holiday as a result of these efforts. TNDP JOB OPENINGS In case you missed it, the Tennessee Democratic Party is accepting applications for a Communications Director and a Data Administrator. body:
But we still need to grow more

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3463%2E377263%2Ehecv-v) Yang Gang --

This campaign has received over 750,000 individual donations.

That’s over 750,000 times someone thought, “I want Andrew Yang to be our next president.”

And that’s more than we ever thought would be possible.

The support and growth we’ve seen has been outstanding, and we must continue to grow if we’re going to take Andrew all the way to the White House.

**[We set a $2 million goal to hit before the end of November to fund critical ads and offices in early states. Can you pitch in $5 to help us continue expanding in the early states and get Andrew on the debate stage in December?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17462?t=5&akid=3463%2E377263%2Ehecv-v)** | [Pitch In ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17462?t=8&akid=3463%2E377263%2Ehecv-v)
---
**The return on investment we’re getting on TV ads is significant -- since launching our ads, we’ve hit 3 out 4 qualifying polls we need to get to Los Angeles.**

Every dollar that you’ve donated to this campaign has helped us show more Americans Andrew’s new way forward. And our team is so grateful for all of your support.

**[Please, help us hit $2 million before the end of November. We are counting on the power of our grassroots community -- not corporate PACs or wealthy donors -- to hit this goal.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17462?t=7&akid=3463%2E377263%2Ehecv-v)**

Thank you and let’s win,

Yang2020

That’s over 750,000 times someone thought, “I want Andrew Yang to be our next president.” And that’s more than we ever thought would be possible. The support and growth we’ve seen has been outstanding, and we must continue to grow if we’re going to take Andrew all the way to the White House. | The return on investment we’re getting on TV ads is significant -- since launching our ads, we’ve hit 3 out 4 qualifying polls we need to get to Los Angeles. Every dollar that you’ve donated to this campaign has helped us show more Americans Andrew’s new way forward. And our team is so grateful for all of your support. Thank you and let’s win, Yang2020 We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

body:
Thank you for joining our team. Together, we'll make government more accountable to the people who support it. We’ll fight for lower taxes. And we’ll Peter, Thank you for joining our team. Together, we'll make government more accountable to the people who support it. We’ll fight for lower taxes. And we’ll focus on the things that really matter to people of the Seventh District: Jobs. Education. Secure Borders. Health care. In short, we’ll make sure Congress works for the families of the Lehigh Valley, while preserving the commonsense conservative values that make it great. Peter, I’d be lying to you if I told you this fight will be easy – that’s why I’ll need all hands on deck. You joining our team is the first step, now I invite you to stay up to date and in the know. name: Team Ed Markey
subject: STOP Trump's rollbacks on auto emission standards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: Did you see this message from Ed? Democrats are rallying together to say NO to Trump's attacks on emission standards that have helped to reduce carbon pollution.

_**[_**Will you join us and sign the petition to tell Trump to STOP the rollbacks on auto emission standards? Click here to add your name!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:****
* * *

_**[_**SIGN ON: Tell Donald Trump to stop attacking auto emission standards!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_
Team,

When President Obama used my legislation to raise emission standards to 55.5/mpg by 2025, we were on a course to drastically reduce the harmful emissions from automobiles.

But now, President Trump is rolling back that law. Under Big Oil's agenda, Trump and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell are doing everything they can to undermine our progress to combat the climate crisis.

We should be increasing emission standards, not lowering them to help corporate polluters' bottom line.

_**_**[That's why Democrats across the country are taking a stand to say STOP the rollbacks on auto emission standards. Will you join me and sign our petition today and make your voice heard?](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")****_
Rolling back vehicle emission standards will cause a severe increase in carbon emissions in our atmosphere, which will:

* Accelerate the climate crisis;
* Increase the risk of chronic illness, such as cardiovascular disease and mental health disorders among vulnerable populations, primarily young kids and communities of color;
* Introduce more pollutants and carcinogens to the air we breathe;
* Undermine the fuel economy standard, costing consumers billions of dollars.

The federal government should not be sacrificing our families and our future to protect corporate polluters and Big Oil.

_**_**[Take a stand and sign our petition today to tell Donald Trump to stop the rollbacks of emission standards!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df0b/693b8b0a/43af626e/72de7a15/1752630028/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")****_
Thanks,

Ed
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: The latest poll out of Wisconsin:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Everyone needs to know about the recent poll from Marquette University Law School.
| | |
---
| Friend, Everyone needs to know about the recent poll from Marquette University Law School. It shows that, if the general election were held today, **only _one_ Democrat would beat Donald Trump in the must-win state of Wisconsin -- take a look:** | **Cory Booker 45%**
**Donald Trump 44%**
---

You remember Wisconsin -- the decisive battleground state that Trump won by less than 23,000 votes in 2016.
**Now, let 's be clear: Take _every_ _poll_ this far out with a gigantic grain of salt.**
But these two things are undeniably true: (1) Cory Booker will be an excellent general election candidate against Donald Trump; and (2) Democrats can't afford to lose Wisconsin next November. There are few paths to winning the Electoral College that don't include the Badger State.
Right now, Cory hasn't qualified for the December debate. If you want to see that change, he needs your help -- [**chip in right now and let 's give Cory the boost he needs to stay on the debate stage.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191125_BHQ_20191125-fr-BHQ-experience-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Thank you,
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191125_BHQ_20191125-fr-BHQ-experience-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

subject: Out of the office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
I wanted to catch you before you put up your out of office message for Thanksgiving. The timing couldn't be worse, but our campaign is facing our November fundraising deadline this Saturday, and we need your help to stay on track. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53587954:stEdjpv8N:m:1:2105898951:B92D5A43FE3AFAEEB2A1AAB98CADFA3C:r)

N/A,

I wanted to catch you before you put up your out of office message for Thanksgiving.

**[The timing couldn't be worse, but our campaign is facing our November fundraising deadline this Saturday, and we need your help to stay on track.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53587954:stEdjpv8N:m:1:2105898951:B92D5A43FE3AFAEEB2A1AAB98CADFA3C:r)**

[ HELP MARTHA WIN ➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53587954:stEdjpv8N:m:1:2105898951:B92D5A43FE3AFAEEB2A1AAB98CADFA3C:r)
We're less than a year out from the 2020 election, and all signs indicate _this is going to be the battleground race that determines Senate control._

Democrats started investing to try to defeat me the day I joined the Senate, and since then, my liberal opponent has outraised our campaign by millions.

In fact, my liberal challenger already has more cash on hand than Democrats running for president and raised more than any other Senator or Senate candidate in the country.

But Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies can't buy this Senate seat.

**[Our campaign is working 24/7 to battle back Democrats' mega millions and hold Arizona, and your support gives us the resources to keep standing strong.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53587954:stEdjpv8N:m:1:2105898951:B92D5A43FE3AFAEEB2A1AAB98CADFA3C:r)**

Thank you for sticking with me, N/A. I hope you have a wonderful and blessed Thanksgiving!

In service,

| Every campaign needs a little help from their friends. Our campaign is no different. Because we refuse to bend to the will of corporate interests and accept corporate PAC money, we have to fight and reach out to organizations that base endorsements on the volume of supporters. Help us attain an endorsement with the DFA, Democracy for America, today!

[https://www2.democracyforamerica.com/endorsement_applicants/2096-ian-todd-for-congress](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=1a59b1b954&e=c56804a14d)

| _Personal Endorsements_
---
| Endorsements from organizations like the DFA are great and everything, but we care more about the personal endorsements from our constituents. After all, this campaign is about the entire community of CD6: what we've been through and what we're capable of achieving together. Let your voice be heard by writing a personal endorsement answering the question: [why do you support Ian Todd?](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=67631e8b0c&e=c56804a14d)

Write a sentence, a short paragraph, an essay, or a multi-part book series of support (We aren't actually enforcing the word limit). You can send your favorite photo of yourself to info@iantoddforcongress.com to be included with your written endorsement.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Sondland implicates the whole White House in the Ukraine scandal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Gordon Sondland, Trump mega-donor and current E.U. ambassador, sang like a bird in his testimony last week. He didn't just reveal that he was following orders from the president to pressure Ukraine \-- he also fully implicated V.P. Mike Pence and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo in the scheme, exposing the rot that is festering in our highest office. The testimony and inquiry have showed just how much this administration has eviscerated the dedicated civil service in the executive branch, gutted the foreign service, and left our international standing in shambles. But we have the chance to do something incredible in 2020. We can take back the White House and the Senate. We can show the courageous witnesses like Fiona Hill, Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman and former ambassador Marie Yovanovitch that they were right to stand up for the truth and for the America we believe in. [**It 's because of people like you that we can reach hundreds of thousands of voters and motivate them to the ballot box, but we can't stop there. We need to build on this momentum, and we need your support immediately in order to do that. Anything you can give, even just $1, will go a long way toward beating Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all their corrupt enablers. Can you donate today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf5/6e9863e8/16ad1f3a/1db0aae9/1004714770/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191125a.ND&refcode2=yYiqz5XT0YowFHxiTklF") Thank you for standing with us in this fight. We couldn't do it without the amazing support of people like you. name: Blue Majority Update
subject: protect our majority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Mike is on the front lines of progress in the Democratic-led House. We know that holding onto the majority means we must organize early.

The GOP has ramped up its fundraising and spending in targeted districts. **They 're feeling threatened by the progress the Democratic majority is making, so they're going to spend BIG to buy their way back into power.**

[**Competitive House races are already picking up steam around the country. We must support Dems in these tough races and hold on to our majority to protect our progress. name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: I'm writing to you today because November has been an incredibly tough month for fundraising -- and we need to do something bold in order to catch up.
body:
This won't be easy.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f57/4bef7a87/6bafc64d/287fffd7/3584694731/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
I'm writing to you today because November has been an incredibly tough month for fundraising - and we need to do something bold in order to catch up:
**That 's why our team set a goal of raising $150,000 before we close the books on November in just 6 days. **
It won't be easy, but there's simply too much at stake for us to fall short.
[**Will you make your first online contribution before our November 30th deadline? I wouldn 't ask if it weren't truly important.****](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f57/4bef7a87/6bafc64d/287fffd6/3584694731/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjUtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191125-1-a")
I believe in this team. I've seen what can happen when we unite around goals that at first seem unachievable. That's how we outraised Susan Collins last quarter without taking any donations from corporate PACs!
And we can do it again, if we all just dig a little deeper.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
P.S. [**I really hope you 'll consider making a contribution - of any amount. clean_body: This won't be easy. "" Friends, I'm writing to you today because November has been an incredibly tough month for fundraising - and we need to do something bold in order to catch up: That 's why our team set a goal of raising $150,000 before we close the books on November in just 6 days. It won't be easy, but there's simply too much at stake for us to fall short. "" I believe in this team. I've seen what can happen when we unite around goals that at first seem unachievable. That's how we outraised Susan Collins last quarter without taking any donations from corporate PACs! And we can do it again, if we all just dig a little deeper. All my best, Amy Mesner Campaign Manager P.S. "" **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: James Mackler
subject: Our national security is under attack:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
This greatly disturbs me ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1c8/18d6a294/4ce901e4/26d63c4a/1930007549/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Our national security is under attack. Recently, we've learned of the "domestic political errand" that an Ambassador - who bought their cushy post with timely political contributions - pursued at the expense of our national security and international alliances. **It 's wrong. And as a veteran, I'm deeply disturbed our elected leaders would risk the safety of our country for their own personal political gain.** I'm running because I'm sick and tired of business as usual in Washington. I'm sick and tired of leaders picking special interests and their own political interests over the interests of the very people they've sworn an oath to represent. Tennessee needs a senator who will stand up for what's right and stand up to any president when they're wrong. I'm prepared to be that senator for Tennessee. [_**If we 're going to change business as usual in Washington, then we need to do it together. Will you make a contribution to our campaign?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1c8/18d6a294/4ce901e4/26d63c4b/1930007549/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191122?refcode=jme191122_z&amount=15&recurring=1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1c8/18d6a294/4ce901e4/26d63c48/1930007549/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjIiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191122?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme191122_nd_&refcode2=107423")

name: Tom Udall
subject: Help send Ben Ray Luján to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Friends, My friend and colleague Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the next U.S. Senator from New Mexico and he needs our help. I have seen Ben Ray's commitment to serving our communities and nation first hand. And we need him in the Senate. [**_Ben Ray's critical end-of-month deadline is on Saturday, and I hope we can count on you to help meet his fundraising goal by pitching in $5 now. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Together, we have worked to expand access to health care, create jobs, and protect the environment. I have fought alongside Ben Ray and I know that he will always fight for New Mexico families. Ben Ray will also continue the hard work of reforming and strengthening our democracy and fighting for an end to the dark, secret money that is corrupting our politics. He will protect our public lands and fight to combat climate change. Ben Ray has been and will continue to be a strong champion for New Mexico. He still needs 1,775 gifts to reach his critical end-of-month goal. Can I count on your $5 to help him? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_udall_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

Thank you,

Tom

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c235/4086001835/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c22a/4086001835/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c22b/4086001835/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c228/4086001835/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c229/4086001835/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b401/18e32a7f/500730c4/7b22c22e/4086001835/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Campaign Update (via Team Lipinski)
subject: update from the ground!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12224177/125484011/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWQ5NjYxNC1jYTBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxWjckdXINe37yUcmDa5YiFD6VdpMBbEw4wLsLuwxZQ=&emci=878556e0-a90f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a1d96614-ca0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| | | | Hi Peter,

As Dan stays busy fighting for IL-03 in Congress and our campaign operations heat up in the district, we wanted to catch you up on what Team Lipinski has been up to for the past few weeks. Take a look!

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
Special thanks to Alderman Matthew J O’Shea for inviting Dan to speak at the 19th Ward Veterans Breakfast. Dan is grateful for every opportunity to talk with our nation’s veterans and to let them know how much we appreciate their sacrifices.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12224179/125484013/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191125_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWQ5NjYxNC1jYTBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxWjckdXINe37yUcmDa5YiFD6VdpMBbEw4wLsLuwxZQ=)
* * *

It was an absolute honor for Dan to sponsor and run in the annual Mike Hike 5K in Homer Glen. This run honors Mike Olivieri, who was killed in Iraq in 2011 while serving in the U.S. Army. Dan is a staple at this race that supports improvements to community trails and parks.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12224180/125484015/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191125_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWQ5NjYxNC1jYTBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxWjckdXINe37yUcmDa5YiFD6VdpMBbEw4wLsLuwxZQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12224182/125484016/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191125_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWQ5NjYxNC1jYTBmLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GxWjckdXINe37yUcmDa5YiFD6VdpMBbEw4wLsLuwxZQ=)
* * *

Dan joined more than 100 people who paid their respects at the Veterans Island Brick Dedication sponsored by the Garfield Ridge Chamber of Commerce. It was a beautiful gesture to see so many patriots brave the cold!

subject: Is your turkey thawing?
body:
It’s Thanksgiving week, and the coming rush of family and food is on all of our minds.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354549-826450-4729301-29cc2a78e2-70b246c511)
Patriot,

It’s Thanksgiving week, and the coming rush of family and food is on all of our minds.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354549-826450-4729300-aa2cb36f8d-70b246c511) But before you sign off for the week and run to the grocery store for those last-minute items, help me close out November strong [**by donating $25 today!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354549-826450-4729300-aa2cb36f8d-70b246c511)

To keep the momentum going for my congressional campaign, we need to reach **Americans just like you** , who want a conservative answer to the squad of socialists who have infiltrated Washington.

**Your[gift of $25 will help me reach 1,000 Americans](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354549-826450-4729300-aa2cb36f8d-70b246c511) who could help me replace a radical, incumbent Democrat in Congress.**
Patriot, if you and the other patriots who are receiving this email donate just $25 today, we’ll be able to meet our November fundraising goals . . .

**. . . and the Fake News media will have to go another quarter lamenting our success.**
We have just **FIVE DAYS** before November comes to a close. Before we all turn our attention to Thanksgiving, I respectfully ask you to [**help us hit our November fundraising goal by donating $25 today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354549-826450-4729300-aa2cb36f8d-70b246c511).

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Laura Loomer

P.S. I'll be heading home this week to spend Thanksgiving with my family, so there is no turkey thawing in my refrigerator. Still, I wanted to send a friendly reminder that **today’s your last day to thaw out your turkey!** Remember, it's one day in the refrigerator for every 5 pounds!

It’s totally corrupt!

House Investigations Committee Chairman Adam Schiff, who is leading the House impeachment hearings, is influencing the process to drive the outcome he wants—the impeachment of President Trump.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Impeachment Is Destroying Democrats
body:
"The past two weeks, the nation was subjected to partisan impeachment hearings orchestrated by House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff (D-CA)." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=261dd48406&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Impeachment Is Destroying Democrats**

“The past two weeks, the nation was subjected to partisan impeachment hearings orchestrated by House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff (D-CA). The process has been unfair to not only House Republicans but also to the target of their investigation, President Trump,” Jeff Crouere writes in _Townhall_.

“On Thursday night, Democratic staffers enjoyed cocktails on Capitol Hill to celebrate the end of a week of televised impeachment hearings. The partygoers believed the hearings were a smashing success on the road to the impeachment of the President. Instead, the evidence shows that Democrats should be worried, not celebrating. The American people are tiring of the Democratic Party’s political antics.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74f2740386&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| While House Democrats were in the middle of trying to sell their impeachment vision to Americans on national TV last week, “a new national survey finds independent voters leading a sharp swing in opposition to impeachment, the second major poll to produce those findings this week . . . The new poll found 49 percent oppose impeachment compared to 34 percent who support it,” Jonathan Easley reports in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a031451cb0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Now that the public is finally getting around to acknowledging that Ukraine's government did insert itself in the 2016 election for the purpose of hurting President Trump's campaign, the national media are pretending that it didn't happen. In the case of the _New York Times_ , they're pretending that they themselves weren't the ones to initially report on it,” Eddie Scarry writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58a78becb6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| A North Carolina farmer is “getting the chance of a lifetime, seeing his turkeys take part in the National Thanksgiving Turkey Presentation [at the White House]. Wellie Jackson, a Butterball turkey farmer based out of Clinton, was selected nine months ago . . . Jackson says they raised the Presidential Flock like the rest of the turkeys: in a clean, healthy, and proper environment,” Michael Lozano reports for [WTVD](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ed80232fa&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The U.S. first family is gearing up for the holidays. First lady Melania Trump will receive the official White House Christmas tree Monday. The more than 5-meter-tall Douglas Fir was cut at Mahantongo Valley Farms in Pitman, Pennsylvania. Owner Larry Snyder won the honor of providing the White House with its official tree after winning an annual contest held by the National Christmas Tree Association,” [_VOA News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bda5bcd5d9&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9ad0e033c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a63bf78775&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=dec12ce422)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| Friends, I would like to thank everyone that came out to my very successful campaign reception at Schilling Beer Co. in Littleton last week! It was extremely humbling to see the room packed wall-to-wall with so many friends and supporters, including former Democratic Senate Candidate Kathleen Kelley who came to support my campaign with a very generous financial contribution! NH needs more bi-partisan cooperation like this! Thank you again, Sen. David Starr P.S. If you weren't able to make the event, but would still like to help us keep the North Country Red, [please consider donating online here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjk3MTcyNjczNTM2NzI2OTgzJmM9bTBpMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yOTU4NTI3OTQmZD1tMHg1dDBn.e4mkPmbI5hqOZnQo26HbVygoofDgo77ELrT9D1Z4D_o) and write "north country" in the notes section!

subject: I need you to help us hit our goal
body:

Friend,
Over the last few weeks, so many of you have joined our campaign for Governor of West Virginia.
With November coming to an end, I wanted to give you an update. We are 75 individual contributions away from our monthly goal. We need your help to get there.
The next few weeks are critical for us to stay on track.
If we can continue to keep up this progress, we are going to continue the same trend that we saw in Kentucky and then Louisiana: Electing more and more Democrats in deeply red states. That is why I have to ask you directly.
Can I count on you to contribute to our campaign before Thanksgiving? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]
If we hit our goal of 75 new donors, we are one step closer to beating Jim Justice.
That is why your contribution is so significant.
Sincerely,
Ben Salango
