| | On February 3rd, Iowa will have their Democratic primary caucuses -- immediately followed by the New Hampshire primaries on February 11.
[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8da/3eb3e2fc/5799762f/744d48b1/3519014537/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all") **These contests have enormous consequences in choosing who our nominee will be.** However, we shouldn't lose sight that there is still a long road ahead. The last primaries are in June, more than 7 months from now. I've said before that 10 weeks is like 10 lifetimes in politics -- there will still be dramatic changes in this race, and no one knows what will happen. The 2020 race is not settled yet. I'm in this for the long haul and I need your support to bring our fight not just to the Early States, but all over the country. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8da/3eb3e2fc/5799762f/744d48a6/3519014537/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8da/3eb3e2fc/5799762f/744d48a5/3519014537/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191125_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). "" These contests have enormous consequences in choosing who our nominee will be. However, we shouldn't lose sight that there is still a long road ahead. The last primaries are in June, more than 7 months from now. I've said before that 10 weeks is like 10 lifetimes in politics -- there will still be dramatic changes in this race, and no one knows what will happen. The 2020 race is not settled yet. I'm in this for the long haul and I need your support to bring our fight not just to the Early States, but all over the country. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Join Us on the Picket Line!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi Sloan for Congress
body:
Heidi is standing with airport workers as they go on strike. Will you stand with us? | |
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=99ae5debc8&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Neighbors, As many folks enjoy time off work, travel, and gather with family this week, we want to center the fact that every person deserves a place to call home. **Each one of us deserves security, a voice, and a life that is dignified.** We remember, this week and every day, that the land we inhabit was first inhabited by and cared for by indigenous peoples. Systems of oppression still permeate these lands. We recognize that our individual liberation is bound up together - **no one of us can truly be free until we are all free**.
And so tomorrow, November 26, we will gather with workers, many of whom are immigrants, many of whom are growing their families, all of whom are trying to build a dignified life. Airline catering workers and their supporters across the country will demand health care and living wages. **We will rally with them to say that _One Job Should Be Enough. _** Join us. **We will gather tomorrow, November 26 at 2 PM
DFW Airport, Terminal D
2400 Aviation Drive Dallas, TX 75261**
[See details for the DFW event here.](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=6854e5cf51&e=c169cb0a8e)

---
| Protests will take place at major airports in:

* Charlotte (CLT)
* Chicago (ORD)
* Dallas-Ft. Worth (DFW)
* Denver (DIA)
* Detroit (DTW)
* Honolulu (HNL)
* Houston (IAH)
* [Los Angeles (LAX)](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=8271890cbb&e=c169cb0a8e)
* [Miami (MIA)](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=3ff1c55b75&e=c169cb0a8e)
* [Minneapolis (MSP)](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=9c74a28b8d&e=c169cb0a8e)
* New York (JFK)
* [Philadelphia (PHL)](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=08b19fab78&e=c169cb0a8e)
* Phoenix (PHX)
* San Diego (SAN)
* San Francisco (SFO)
* Seattle (SEATAC)
* [Washington, D.C. (DCA)](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2feaafbdff&e=c169cb0a8e)

[Sign and share the petition](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=e2674d7be4&e=c169cb0a8e) to call on American Airlines to fix this labor dispute before Thanksgiving week!

For more information, please contact [ntran@unitehere.org](mailto:ntran@unitehere.org) or text 714-788-0404.

In solidarity,

Heidi Sloan
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: I'm running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[It's official -- I'm running for re-election to continue serving Illinois families in the Senate. Will you make a $5 contribution now to help launch my 2020 campaign?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-2020-reelection-moneybomb?refcode=em191125&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter,
**Today, I 'm filing the paperwork to kick off my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate.**
In the Senate, I have worked tirelessly for families in Illinois and across the nation, fighting to defend the Affordable Care Act, enact meaningful criminal justice reform, secure our elections from foreign interference, and hold President Trump accountable for his reckless actions.
I have also been a champion for passing comprehensive immigration reform and standing with Dreamers. I introduced the original Dream Act in 2001 and have been fighting to give these hardworking young people a path to citizenship in the only country they've ever known.
**[I need your support to keep up these fights and so many more in the Senate. Contribute $5 right now to show your support and help launch my 2020 re-election campaign.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-2020-reelection-moneybomb?refcode=em191125&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-2020-reelection-moneybomb?refcode=em191125&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Keeping Illinois blue is critical in the fight to give Democrats control of the Senate in 2020 -- which means we simply cannot afford to lose this race, Peter.
Taking back the House has been crucial to holding President Trump accountable and passing legislation that helps move our country forward -- but the Senate GOP is blocking all of the progress that House Democrats are making for the American people. We must ensure our next Democratic President won't be subjected to Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard.
**We can win the Senate, Peter -- but we have to win this race.**
**[Say you're with me in the fight to keep Illinois blue and elect a Democratic Senate majority in 2020. Pitch in $5 right now to help launch my re-election campaign.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-2020-reelection-moneybomb?refcode=em191125&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-2020-reelection-moneybomb?refcode=em191125&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4f36/42ab3cf4/60535901/135d48e4/4049039580/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4f36/42ab3cf4/60535901/135d48e5/4049039580/VEsB/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Tina Smith
subject: Will you let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm about to ask you to make a contribution to my Senate campaign in Minnesota. Give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hey there,

In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my Senate campaign in Minnesota. We have a really important end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up this week, and I want to explain why this is such an important moment for our growing campaign.

Every single day I am in the U.S. Senate, I'm making sure Washington is doing right by working families, veterans, farmers, and everyone who deserves a voice in our government. That's what I was elected to do -- work hard to get things done for YOU.

I have fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs and end the opioid epidemic. I also introduced legislation to expand access to childcare and helped pass a bipartisan bill to support Minnesota's farmers and ranchers. And I'm just getting started, folks.

**Last November, you raised your voice to elect me to the Senate and together, we won our race by double digits. I'm grateful for the support you gave me then, and I'm asking you to do the same now.**

We are facing a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline this week, but according to my finance team, we will fall short of where we need to be to meet our goal for November if we don't see a surge in online donations from folks like you _right now_.

**Can I count on you to rush a donation of any amount before our all-important fundraising deadline this week? Every dollar makes a difference in our race to save Minnesota's Senate seat. Your contribution of any amount can help us win and bring Democrats one step closer to securing the majority.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191125-lme?refcode=em191125-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

The responses to messages like this one are always so great, and it's your donations that will allow us to build a winning campaign this time around too. I cannot tell you how grateful I am that you're a part of this.

-- Tina

name: Christina Finello
subject: 6 hours left until our match closes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Hi Peter,

We missed our end of week goal on Friday, which was disappointing. But then a group of rockstar supporters stepped up and agreed to MATCH every donation made for a short period of time \-- until midnight tonight.

If you care about growing our House majority and electing Dems up and down the ticket, invest in my campaign so we can run the expansive field operation we need to win BIG again in 2020. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Gerrymandering will decide the vote in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, There's a reason that awful, unresponsive, obstructionist members of Congress get re-elected. There's a reason Republicans have a chance at winning back the House \-- gerrymandering. Take Jim Jordan's district, Ohio 4. House Republicans transferred him to the Intelligence Committee just for the impeachment hearings to shout lies and distractions at every possible opportunity. He doesn't need to worry about being proven wrong on live television day in and day out because his district looks like this: That duck of a district means Jim Jordan doesn't need to prove basic competency in order to win re-election. It's time to end partisan gerrymandering, and ensure that every vote is valued. [**Congress has the ability to outlaw partisan gerrymandering, but they have refused to do anything. Join us in calling on our lawmakers to pass legislation that ends this voter suppression before the 2020 census gives the GOP another chance to steal seats across the country and silence even more voters.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf8/6e9863e8/16af65ea/1db0aaed/2531241651/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/gerrymandering/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for democracy, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf8/6e9863e8/16af65ea/1db0aaed/2531241651/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/gerrymandering/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm about to ask if you can make a contribution to our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we let big money control our campaigns now, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington in 2020. We've got to make big, structural change. And we're going to... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4ee/45c30650/118057383/66f6fef4/896769350/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There's a lot we're proud of on this campaign: town halls and house parties, pinky promises and super volunteers, plans and bold ideas.

**But there's one thing I don't want anyone to ever lose sight of: Grassroots donors make it all possible. And we own what we're building together.**

We own a grassroots campaign without closed-door fundraisers or ambassadorships for sale.

We own a grassroots campaign that doesn't ask for money from the rich and powerful, and doesn't owe them any favors.

We own a grassroots campaign built by thousands and thousands of people, pitching in to grow our movement one dollar at a time.

**This campaign, this movement, is only possible with contributions from people like you, and our next big test is our November fundraising deadline.** We're counting on the money we raise this month to power the next phase of the campaign -- heading straight into the first caucuses and primaries.

**[This is our moment to dream big, fight hard, and win. We've set a big goal for our November fundraising, and we need your help to hit it. Will you chip in right now? This Saturday's deadline is a big one.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4ee/45c30650/118057383/66f6fef8/896769350/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFPRl9FT01fTEFVX0VfMjAxOTExMjVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1OF_EOM_LAU_E_20191125_V1S2_P")**

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4ee/45c30650/118057383/66f6fef8/896769350/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFPRl9FT01fTEFVX0VfMjAxOTExMjVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1OF_EOM_LAU_E_20191125_V1S2_P")

>
In 2020, we'll have a choice on the ballot between corruption and its antidote. But even before then, we have choices to make about what we're willing to fight for.

We'll have to choose between change that billionaires are comfortable with, and change that makes a real difference for working families.

We'll have to choose between Wall Street fundraisers, and speaking out about how our economy isn't working for working families.

We'll have to choose between a politics that runs on money -- a well-oiled machine for super PACs and federal lobbyists -- and a politics grounded in our communities.

**If we let big money control our campaigns now, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington in 2020.

We've got to make big, structural change. And we're _going_ to.** But it'll take a massive grassroots movement to get it done.

**[Right now, we need all hands on deck to hit our big November fundraising goal. If you can, please chip in-- and let's make change happen together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4ee/45c30650/118057383/66f6fef8/896769350/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFPRl9FT01fTEFVX0VfMjAxOTExMjVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1OF_EOM_LAU_E_20191125_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A big number for a big reason
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't let up now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7584?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=3&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7) Listen, friend -- I know Thanksgiving is coming up, and I know you have plenty on your plate (metaphorically and actually!) this week -- but we can't let up right now. We're less than three weeks away from our legally mandated fundraising stop: On December 14th, we have to stop fundraising for _nearly four months_ during the Washington state legislative session freeze. Many of our opponents in this race can keep on going. The Republican Governors Association certainly won't let up, but as long as the Washington state legislature is in session, we can't raise a dime. **So we've set an online goal of $30,000 to raise before Wednesday -- it's a big number for a big reason. There's so much to do here in Washington state, and that progress and success is emulated across the country. The progress we make here is what's at stake, and we're a huge target right now:** [**Make a grassroots donation of $5 or more right now, and let's raise $30,000 before Thanksgiving!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7584?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=4&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7585?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=5&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7586?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=6&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7587?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=7&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7588?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=8&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7589?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=9&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7590?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=10&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---
There were just three huge governor's races in Kentucky, Mississippi, and Louisiana -- and Democrats won two of them! That's a huge success.
But it means the Republican Governors Association will be that much more desperate for a big win in 2020, and they only have a few options. My seat is one of them.
And while we pride ourselves on being an incredibly progressive state, this month's elections showed that nothing is certain here. We just lost two really big ballot initiatives -- it's up to us to ensure the governorship isn't next.
**All this is why we have an aggressive fundraising goal to hit by Wednesday -- before Thanksgiving, before our fundraising freeze: $30,000 in grassroots donations. Can we count on you to make one of them?** [**Donate $5 or more now to fund the fight ahead.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7584?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=11&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7584?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=12&akid=7991%2E868730%2EEoX0Z7)
---

So we've set an online goal of $30,000 to raise before Wednesday -- it's a big number for a big reason. There's so much to do here in Washington state, and that progress and success is emulated across the country. The progress we make here is what's at stake, and we're a huge target right now: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | There were just three huge governor's races in Kentucky, Mississippi, and Louisiana -- and Democrats won two of them! That's a huge success. But it means the Republican Governors Association will be that much more desperate for a big win in 2020, and they only have a few options. My seat is one of them. And while we pride ourselves on being an incredibly progressive state, this month's elections showed that nothing is certain here. We just lost two really big ballot initiatives -- it's up to us to ensure the governorship isn't next. All this is why we have an aggressive fundraising goal to hit by Wednesday -- before Thanksgiving, before our fundraising freeze: $30,000 in grassroots donations. Can we count on you to make one of them? Very truly yours, Jay

He fought for affordable housing during last week’s debate — make sure he can do it again in the December debate by [_making a donation today_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5cH6hxQvS29lzVgnBnGhaB-2BgA-2BgH3OqOgrCECLpv6UdUWrl4cfCVqRST6mLR2TWVbsXoQLqHEMlou2lEDWq2MABZSBFL2itm-2FRHjc4St1kMxX8jgGCRFaBne8vEU6MHKSmj7ypM2qDcHzrcSG2c8KPoS4RMw83I7Igyhzy4ZyztPvaD8P-2F35TPmR1mu7APf3y_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc2ygtZBuSgG2oYspBjNuCd6b1EbaPhPcgyiPR61hORsBZbH4A95jJeHb-2BjRYg07psBW3OJcauVYyStMG1PbO4kqzKBbGfoGLeM8bQES3RfHoaqVOSiBKFUjc-2Bh-2FIPy-2Bc3PLahtn3OFzBwB-2FbCeIJJQcXIzFK5chO1zUl-2BaGqezBDBhh-2FgNE09kFPGsuAPBFsEGwE0XVtzhJcpA7SAqLwjg2htxqfp7Sr-2B1itZFgkzuNc-2F07VAf9mHAExKTTw5TYazagjg-2FeustxuTmDLON9oV7soOUOJG3e36qsRhUCwBUY-2Ff1o21G36mLEcwvd8A2UGppjDkSoOoIp99M1qs36uhnCFagsc4s0hTzzYuLAtyjtA-3D-3D)._ Friend, Where we lay our head at night determines so much about our life: whether we’re surrounded by clean air and water, can provide healthy food for our families, rely on economic security, and have access to a strong education. But big corporate interests — and their corruption of our government and leaders — have turned America’s real estate industry into a $1.9 trillion business that favors the wealthy and preys on the people.

For too long, the American housing market has been ballooning out of control, making the rich even richer and putting vulnerable people on the streets.**Tom will fight to ensure all Americans have access to safe and affordable housing —[ _read more on how the Affordable Housing plan can make that a reality_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWTJRnH5WhxscHG1gi0zJ-2BpkE2F-2Fy0GnsERzYYAHy9MdDdrgjdtxeTcNr-2B-2Bqud-2F4MN3rmg-2B0IY-2FXwcp2UuHt8vGHaA0-2BzcaqaFTcFkLqx2qOUbIStjOG7MsifObi40mJ0koSz40mYlEK5KlwpppGm2tZUQDBOssg9ZsQ-2FUCM2vsz8sMt-2BY3jGdS9OW-2FZ53OCJ0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc2ygtZBuSgG2oYspBjNuCd6b1EbaPhPcgyiPR61hORsBZbH4A95jJeHb-2BjRYg07psBW3OJcauVYyStMG1PbO4kqzKBbGfoGLeM8bQES3RfHoaqVOSiBKFUjc-2Bh-2FIPy-2Bc3PLahtn3OFzBwB-2FbCeIJJQpjpjugQ0sU0C8HpoMulHR6EGPAy6DcbFg5ZC8scOPzlI2mBqu19e25k8mRwbKOf4AK9NNg7W-2FxsY5RFZ4veT6xh6-2BRb-2BRb4iafDPCU2WnxCmQhDYZ2Nb1leuBNjGXUPYox3SFFnDN9zyk2hIsEMlneEOyoUidVKPEivwy-2F9VS86FN-2FT73DsbqJ0PdxS53MJXWAjQ17aLPaBEn6h0V5rGew-3D-3D).** Tom will help families build a stable future by reducing mortgage costs and offering tax breaks for low-income and middle-class renters. And he will address environmental waste policies that have concentrated toxic waste near communities of color for too long.

[**_Learn more about Tom’s housing plan, and add your name if you believe that safe, affordable housing is a right for everyone, not just the wealthy._**](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWTJRnH5WhxscHG1gi0zJ-2BpkE2F-2Fy0GnsERzYYAHy9MdDdrgjdtxeTcNr-2B-2Bqud-2F4MN3rmg-2B0IY-2FXwcp2UuHt8vGHaA0-2BzcaqaFTcFkLqx2qOUbIStjOG7MsifObi40mJ0koSz40mYlEK5KlwpppGm2tZUQDBOssg9ZsQ-2FUCM2vsz8sMt-2BY3jGdS9OW-2FZ53OCJ0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFc2ygtZBuSgG2oYspBjNuCd6b1EbaPhPcgyiPR61hORsBZbH4A95jJeHb-2BjRYg07psBW3OJcauVYyStMG1PbO4kqzKBbGfoGLeM8bQES3RfHoaqVOSiBKFUjc-2Bh-2FIPy-2Bc3PLahtn3OFzBwB-2FbCeIJJQIcLAWvqlZyKCDuKOB1BbTzuE-2BxZ94mtMNQ8r8o5U1zNtEfv0smfw18qYKDOEqWQf4Xx8jPFwKIXMzv2EZg68VB53K6GbkLpCiVNiA5YPVNDkAgo3zvcIpkvOLYtOTkHiJ-2BSdc7fI8wBUUripPgADqIQdWtXdUXhVF4xsMxSnew5FTu8L-2FQoZKacKDfmqdmNgnDm44cqO9SlY5w-2FzVU0A1A-3D-3D) Yours in the fight, Tom 2020

clean_body: | | | | Read more on Tom’s Affordable Housing plan. He fought for affordable housing during last week’s debate — make sure he can do it again in the December debate by . Friend, Where we lay our head at night determines so much about our life: whether we’re surrounded by clean air and water, can provide healthy food for our families, rely on economic security, and have access to a strong education. But big corporate interests — and their corruption of our government and leaders — have turned America’s real estate industry into a $1.9 trillion business that favors the wealthy and preys on the people. For too long, the American housing market has been ballooning out of control, making the rich even richer and putting vulnerable people on the streets.Tom will fight to ensure all Americans have access to safe and affordable housing —. Tom will help families build a stable future by reducing mortgage costs and offering tax breaks for low-income and middle-class renters. And he will address environmental waste policies that have concentrated toxic waste near communities of color for too long. Yours in the fight, Tom 2020 | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . name: Nikki Foster
subject: Distracting, downplaying, and deceiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | We now know for sure that the president sought to use a foreign power to benefit himself politically. This is an impeachable offense. You might wonder, how are his supporters in Congress justifying this? Three ways: by distracting, downplaying, and deceiving. My opponent Steve Chabot is no different: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We now know for sure that the president sought to use a foreign power to benefit himself politically. **This is an impeachable offense.** You might wonder, how are his supporters in Congress justifying this? **Three ways: by distracting, downplaying, and deceiving**. My opponent Steve Chabot is no different: [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1") Rather than acknowledge the truth and respect the honorable diplomats who testified, **Chabot sought to discredit them and minimize their earth-shaking testimony.** **This is a huge departure from when he authored the impeachment articles against Bill Clinton** \-- he seems to no longer believe that "nobody is above the law." He's abandoned his responsibility to the American people, and we can't trust him to serve us. [**Chip in today so we can restore dignity to federal office ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+today+so+we+can+restore+dignity+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1")

When I joined the Air Force, I took an oath to _support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic._
Chabot took a similar oath when he was sworn in, and again each time he was re-elected. **You 'd think by now he'd remember it, after nearly a quarter of a century in Congress.**
But he's spitting in the face of that oath by blindly defending the president in the face of mounting evidence -- **and the people have had enough.**
In Washington, I'll take my oath and my responsibility seriously. **I 'll always fight for the good of the American people.**
[**If you 're tired of Chabot putting party over country, chip in today to help put an end to it ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+If+yoursquore+tired+of+Chabot+putting+pa&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1")
| | [Enough is enough](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=10+-+Enough+is+enough&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191125_Impeach_U1_X1")
---
The people of OH-01 are watching, Congressman Chabot.
Nikki

subject: this time next year…

body:
| | | Listen:

In less than a year, the 2020 elections will be over.

Democrats will either have held or lost the House - and the outcome, like 2018, is going to depend on California.

That’s why Zoe is laser focused on shoring up the funding necessary to fight back against GOP attacks coming our way. We’re looking at a major shortage for November and need to bring in $5,000 by the end of the month. Can you dig deep and chip in?

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

body:

| Team,

We're doing a checkup on our records this week to make sure they're all up to date. And here's what we have on file for you at this exact email address: Record belonging to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
Team Hick: **Yes** (Thank you!)
Hick for Senate Donor: **Not yet.**
Suggested Action Today: [**_Chip in $3 or whatever you can to get on the record._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191125_TH_20191125-fr-TH-supporterrecord-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **_[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191125_TH_20191125-fr-TH-supporterrecord-2mo_2mo_contribbutton1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")_** In just a few short months, this team has helped us build our grassroots campaign in what some believe is the most important Senate race in the country. That's incredible.

There's a long road ahead of us, and the other side is already showing they're going to throw every last penny into trying to beat John. But because of this team, we're ready for whatever they've got.

This week is about gratitude, and John knows he couldn't do any of this without people like you. Thank you for everything.

Team Hick **_[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191125_TH_20191125-fr-TH-supporterrecord-2mo_2mo_contribbutton2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")_** _If you 've recently made a donation or have donated with another email address, thank you! Sometimes it takes our records a moment to update, but rest assured, we have received your contribution. Thank you for helping us hit our end-of-month goal._
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771456/691c9bd/6f9e374b/11a7d9e2/1935572451/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.

name: Justin Francese
subject: my wife is running for Congress
body:
she was in her first year at a near by college. When we met, she was holding a banner | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EwE/ni0YAA/t.2x0/2ipNoFqxTD-1NmLd3JDO1Q/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718HrUd9KRt8IkRJ6Sf1cPqt3ogKbs-2FgXD8m4KnlvlCl1n0ML-2FeeqDxg22M1F5l-2BEGy1hRfGcfB6-2FsNjD4TmgdKhtAvmX8XVhL8WZuogNM5x1KN2K9np-2FhykmdrqwwctiNIakcAEKYw-2FEPjhu8VtQ1RuDefSHb6ZTs0LgMUGmqEBJA-3D/RkIO)
---
Friend, It was Earth Day 1999. I was a senior at the University of Vermont and she was in her first year at a near by college. When we met, she was holding a banner demanding that the University cut ties with the pesticide giant, Monsanto. I knew that I had to join her. But how could I have known that my life would change forever. Since then I have seen her fight corporate power and win, over and over again, against all the odds. When she told me late last year that she had been nudged to consider a run for Congress, I was all in. Now I need you to join me. Our family is putting everything on the line to win this race, and I am asking you to **help me meet my 44th birthday fundraising goal of $4,400 by Saturday.**
---

clean_body: she was in her first year at a near by college. When we met, she was holding a banner | | Friend, It was Earth Day 1999. I was a senior at the University of Vermont and she was in her first year at a near by college. When we met, she was holding a banner demanding that the University cut ties with the pesticide giant, Monsanto. I knew that I had to join her. But how could I have known that my life would change forever. Since then I have seen her fight corporate power and win, over and over again, against all the odds. When she told me late last year that she had been nudged to consider a run for Congress, I was all in. Now I need you to join me. Our family is putting everything on the line to win this race, and I am asking you to help me meet my 44th birthday fundraising goal of $4,400 by Saturday. | Give $44 to celebrate my birthday. name: David Hill
subject: I want to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC
body:
I’m a native of Oklahoma City with a passion for serving. I want to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is David Hill. I have never held public office and have no interest in becoming a career politician. I’m a native of Oklahoma City with a passion for serving. I have built a successful business, raised a beautiful family, and invested time and resources serving the community. The Democrat takeover of the US House last year grabbed my attention. On October 1st, I filed my candidacy to defeat Democrat Kendra Horn and fire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House. I am the only conservative businessman outsider in this race. Despite never holding political office, I am a leading candidate in the race to defeat Kendra because of my solid business background and a strong record of leadership in the community. I began turning wrenches at the age of 16, fixing and rebuilding classic cars. Now I own and operate MAR-K, the nation’s leading manufacturer of over 6,000 parts for classic automobiles and trucks. Before acquiring MAR-K, I spent 28 years in leadership positions across the education, energy, manufacturing, and technology industries, including at Logic Energy Solutions, Petrosmith, and Kimray Inc., where I was named one of Oklahoma’s “Most Admired CEOs” by The Journal Record. I, and my wife of 26 years, Shannon, have six beautiful children, including three strong, independent daughters and three selfless sons who all serve in the Army. David Jr. graduated from West Point and serves as a first lieutenant in the Army flying Black Hawk helicopters. Lauren is a University of Notre Dame graduate who works in IT security in Chicago. Hunter is a senior at West Point and upon graduation in May, will be commissioned as a second lieutenant in the Army. Tucker serves in Army ROTC while studying mechanical and aerospace engineering at Princeton University. Finally, Katherine is a senior, and Ashley is a sophomore at Bishop McGuinness Catholic High School in Oklahoma City. My family attends Christ the King Catholic Church in Oklahoma City. I won’t go along to get along. I’m not a career politician. I’m a fixer, a tough negotiator, and a leader. I will fight to fix Congress. I will answer to Oklahomans, and I’ll put an end to Nancy Pelosi’s crazy liberal experiment.
I need your help. We can win this race if we have enough support from Republicans like you. Please support my campaign to defeat Kendra Horn, and fire Speaker Nancy Pelosi. You can find more information about me on my website, [https://www.davidhillforok.com](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=bc17be939a624b95b8bd6fa6aa48ed88&_e=Yc7kZIOIC_C4RdXVKu0HLjPPWVf_At0SU8Vdc6jvGI3WYmDMCr3T_CLAbeASLYcwJUUEmbEbSVL2ic2hfZLNZJdubPW2Ni8C1Db53sUwbXaZzMwAwyel_vFAuVuAsKqn7zavOx3tQmtT7GPIczd58nIMX4-VMFIKjwN5flRNeXV5wMmZc-vT5krmmz7PQ89Hw_3Yg9fzgSBwoqM7fjfbYr7ND2gFGXGZvbUs5_KW_iZ-lZFmUUNnt9xnqveHQTy0KOvU5yxAkapToLVOxZbHpQ-gTBZ10bndv44VNfzMhAXrMeO3S8xEn1boehJuvH5t134E4OsmSgfRpi-8JJiHH-JJe6ui8I4lIW3Caa08Hkw%3D), clean_body: I’m a native of Oklahoma City with a passion for serving. I want to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is David Hill. I have never held public office and have no interest in becoming a career politician. I’m a native of Oklahoma City with a passion for serving. I have built a successful business, raised a beautiful family, and invested time and resources serving the community. The Democrat takeover of the US House last year grabbed my attention. On October 1st, I filed my candidacy to defeat Democrat Kendra Horn and fire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House. I am the only conservative businessman outsider in this race. Despite never holding political office, I am a leading candidate in the race to defeat Kendra because of my solid business background and a strong record of leadership in the community. I began turning wrenches at the age of 16, fixing and rebuilding classic cars. Now I own and operate MAR-K, the nation’s leading manufacturer of over 6,000 parts for classic automobiles and trucks. Before acquiring MAR-K, I spent 28 years in leadership positions across the education, energy, manufacturing, and technology industries, including at Logic Energy Solutions, Petrosmith, and Kimray Inc., where I was named one of Oklahoma’s “Most Admired CEOs” by The Journal Record. I, and my wife of 26 years, Shannon, have six beautiful children, including three strong, independent daughters and three selfless sons who all serve in the Army. David Jr. graduated from West Point and serves as a first lieutenant in the Army flying Black Hawk helicopters. Lauren is a University of Notre Dame graduate who works in IT security in Chicago. Hunter is a senior at West Point and upon graduation in May, will be commissioned as a second lieutenant in the Army. Tucker serves in Army ROTC while studying mechanical and aerospace engineering at Princeton University. Finally, Katherine is a senior, and Ashley is a sophomore at Bishop McGuinness Catholic High School in Oklahoma City. My family attends Christ the King Catholic Church in Oklahoma City. I won’t go along to get along. I’m not a career politician. I’m a fixer, a tough negotiator, and a leader. I will fight to fix Congress. I will answer to Oklahomans, and I’ll put an end to Nancy Pelosi’s crazy liberal experiment. I need your help. We can win this race if we have enough support from Republicans like you. Please support my campaign to defeat Kendra Horn, and fire Speaker Nancy Pelosi. You can find more information about me on my website, , and on , , and . If you would like to donate, Please let me know if you have any other questions. David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC. | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: It's almost as if Republicans don't want to protect women and survivors...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Congress let VAWA lapse almost a year ago now, and it's not clear yet how much damage has been caused by the lack of federal funding for domestic abuse programs across the country \-- but Republicans allegedly trying to fix the problem have somehow found a way to make things worse. Senate Republicans just released their version of the VAWA reauthorization act, and it's about as shitty as you'd expect. The House passed a version that would take guns out of the hands of those convicted of misdemeanor stalking offenses and those with temporary restraining orders in place against them, which seems like sense, but not to the NRA, which relies so heavily on the lucrative controlling abusive spouse market. The GOP version also walks back any progress on recognizing domestic violence in the LGBTQ+ community AND makes it harder for Native victims of domestic violence to seek justice in tribal courts. It's clear that we need to elect more Democrats, retake the Senate, and kick out the misogynistic, obstructionist GOP from every office we can if we're going to make any progress for this country. When Democrats is motivating voters to turn out to vote in 2020 and flip the Senate, but falling short of our November digital goal would mean we'd have to scale back. [**Every dollar given goes toward helping us fight back against Mitch McConnell, Jodi Ernst, and Senate Republicans who care more about pleasing the NRA than they do about helping survivors. Can you pitch in by donating even just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf7/6e9863e8/16a8a1c2/1db0aaf6/556559167/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191125c.ND&refcode2=2tQ4LGXwxwUkSOQu1HgR") Your support is critical to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf7/6e9863e8/16a8a1c2/1db0aaf5/556559167/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191125c.ND&refcode2=2tQ4LGXwxwUkSOQu1HgR")
---

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: Yang2020
subject: See you on the campaign trail -- literally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
You can have your name printed on our campaign bus.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3586%2E377263%2E8E46Ur) You power this campaign, Yang Gang -- and we want everyone to know it. From South Carolina to California, from Texas to Iowa, we want to show everyone the power of the Yang Gang.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Will you do everything you can to keep VA blue?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Statewide races are key to helping Democratic candidates win big up and down the ballot.
|
---
| | **Mark 's re-election campaign is the only 2020 statewide race in VA
[Chip in >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d798/53d9897e/53fcf420/1c89e82c/1418276333/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-crucial?refcode=20191125nd__360__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** Derek,

**Statewide races are key to helping Democratic candidates win big up and down the ballot.** When a high-profile, statewide race tops the ballot, that big campaign does all it can to build an organization that's able to turn out voters for the _entire_ slate of Democratic candidates. It's the kind of teamwork that helps make real progress possible.

I saw this firsthand in 2018 during my own re-election campaign, when we worked hard to support Democrats up and down the ticket -- including our three incredible Democratic Congresswomen who helped flip the House. If we want to defend our progress in Virginia, we'll need to do it again in 2020 with Mark Warner's campaign for Senate.

**Since his race will be the only statewide race in Virginia next year, helping Mark build a statewide grassroots campaign organization will be critical not just to re-electing him, but also to helping every other Virginia Democrat on the ballot win. Will you donate whatever amount you can to Mark 's campaign for Senate? ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Oops?
body:
Rita Hart may have just said the quiet part out loud... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/oops?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
# Peter,
Did you see the email that Rita Hart’s campaign manager just sent? Look at the highlighted portion below.
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0b88394211&e=90fad69796)
He says, “that no matter what, Rita’s going to accept corruption in Washington”. Since launching her campaign, liberal Democrat Rita Hart has cozied up to the corrupt DC donor class that works every day to rip off Americans across the country and right here in Iowa. I’m running for Congress to give Iowa’s 2nd district the conservative representation we DESERVE, but to do that I’m going to need your help. [**Can you donate $5, $25, or even $50 today to help elect a conservative fighter who will stand up to the corrupt Democrat establishment?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=6820657f7e&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=a8459316fd&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| With Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi pushing a baseless and partisan impeachment coup instead of passing America First trade deals, we can’t afford to have their corrupt party in charge for another two years. This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the nation -- and it’s going to be the front line in winning back the House from Nancy Pelosi. [**Please donate today, and help me go to Washington to FIGHT BACK against the corrupt Democrat establishment.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c83bcdf964&e=90fad69796)

For Freedom,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=32d94c3389&e=90fad69796)
\- Bobby Schilling

name: Team Weld
subject: Campaign Highlights & Happenings — November 25th, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee
body:
|
---
| [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=1)
# Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=2)
### Happy Thanksgiving!
From our family to yours, we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving! We at Team Weld are thankful for you, our supporters, and for the opportunity to reclaim our country.
### Ballot Access: We are officially on the ballot for FOUR states and counting!
On November 22nd, Governor Weld filed his Candidate Oath with the Republican Party of Florida. He met all of the filing requirements and we expect the Florida Secretary of State to announce Florida’s qualified candidate’s no later than December 3rd. Additionally, Governor Weld submitted his Proof of Candidate Form in California and submitted his written request to appear on Georgia’s ballot – so we will keep you posted on those two states. Our ballot access team is diligently working to get on all of the remaining ballots, and we will keep you updated on our progress! | | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuwn8I4NFZyz-BZteisw110k&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=3)
---
## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### Northeastern News: _A long-shot Republican presidential candidate sees a path to the party convention. He's not dreaming._
"If the ongoing impeachment inquiry were to result in the early departure of President Donald Trump, how would his absence affect the 2020 election? In that unlikely event, who would be the replacement Republican candidate?" [Watch the event here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Jf5369wumFB0gJEZTII_ftn1I8K5amfbTE7YfnrEK8y4gqdEsOwyrjNmPw2IhOT5xryHAVHw61gV7BDa6emfwzq7UV_vQIIIeFCxdi1I43fklnUorbR6h6mVuwr1ZGG0whrzstMTUzvFoxC5IrJhmaY0KtI8MVsjgRe1zCD7aTKWjbJrXnhms9jsgN98ci6s_WXAN3-gaAWsdVAc1AHdnw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=4)

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Jf5369wumFB0gJEZTII_ftn1I8K5amfbTE7YfnrEK8y4gqdEsOwyrjNmPw2IhOT5xryHAVHw61gV7BDa6emfwzq7UV_vQIIIeFCxdi1I43fklnUorbR6h6mVuwr1ZGG0whrzstMTUzvFoxC5IrJhmaY0KtI8MVsjgRe1zCD7aTKWjbJrXnhms9jsgN98ci6s_WXAN3-gaAWsdVAc1AHdnw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=5)
### Dallas News: _Weld is the GOP answer_
"In 2016, all the “talking heads” predicted that Hillary Clinton would defeat Donald Trump. They were wrong. In 2019, all the “talking heads” predict that Donald Trump will be the Republican presidential nominee. Again, they are wrong."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=dhBZ-zWwOxZN7KhzWLXKDveqb6JPYpGbatbb6iQLPASFSZI9Ohtz24kQTk5ubsBJ5oLRT4Q3LUaYxNlefLsf2q5eAyfeTSGzXl2v_FKAO_pWwLEWilcukHNoceczaT35T0qoaNKvCApt03Zcr4XPlo2xa6wMFFYSB1hbsVkfqyGxKgqDdRN4tBEv4idY2_ksxjQPYkustFZhAkZ0WDJ2-Jg6EJOA6ORM0qTr3H6RS7zeGQzM15wp7Fa_rAhvSTGz&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=6)
### WMUR-TV: _Close Up: Bill Weld believes impeachment helps his GOP primary campaign_
Watch the interview at the link below!

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY0rZi75ULpRtb5LK0eaNe9&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=7)
| [weld2020.org](weld2020.org) | [ Gov Bill Weld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=8) | [ @govbillweld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tqwz1e-RkyfKg8oS4PThRIU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191125_newsletter&n=9)

From knocking on doors and talking with voters, to opening new field offices, to producing moving video ads, grassroots donors help make it all happen. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4fd/45c30650/119f773b1/66f6e034/145612368/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We have an important fundraising deadline this week -- if you're able to, now would be the best time to make your first donation to this campaign.

All of the work that this team puts in each month is possible because of grassroots donors -- from knocking on doors and talking with voters, to opening new field offices, to producing moving video ads -- contributions to emails like this one make it all happen.

**[This time of year is when we need to kick this work into high gear, and our next big test is hitting our November fundraising goal this week. Can you make your first donation today to help hit this important goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4fd/45c30650/119f773b1/66f6e037/145612368/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFTRl9FT01fR1JNX1dfMjAxOTExMjVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1SF_EOM_GRM_W_20191125_V1S1_P")**

>
Because of grassroots donors, we are able to organize communities across the country and build a grassroots movement to fix the systemic issues that our country is facing.

The only way we can grow this movement is by raising enough grassroots donations to hit every monthly fundraising goal. Elizabeth doesn't take a dime from Washington lobbyists, special interests, or PACs of any kind, and she doesn't host exclusive fundraising events to fund this campaign.

**[It's powerfully important that we hit this goal by the end of the month. Can you make your first donation today?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4fd/45c30650/119f773b1/66f6e037/145612368/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFTRl9FT01fR1JNX1dfMjAxOTExMjVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1SF_EOM_GRM_W_20191125_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

| | Hey there -- I'm Sean, James' finance director. I keep track of our numbers and make sure we'll have the resources to fund our operations, including everything from printing canvassing materials to hosting events. [_**Before you head out for the holiday, will you chip in to make sure we can reach our end-of-month goal on Saturday?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cd/18d6a294/4ce86527/26d63d53/1068739928/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191125?refcode=jme191125_m&amount=5&recurring=1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cd/18d6a294/4ce86527/26d63d50/1068739928/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjUiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJiIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191125?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme191125_b_&refcode2=107423")

---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cd/18d6a294/4ce86527/26d63d5e/1068739928/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjUiLCJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191125?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme191125_b_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cd/18d6a294/4ce86527/26d63d5f/1068739928/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191125?refcode=jme191125_b_other&refcode2=107423")
---
I know Thanksgiving is right around the corner, but I'm worried we won't reach our goal.
James isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs, and I'll be honest: That's good for governing but it's not as good for raising money for an expensive campaign.
And here's why: Other campaigns can take in tens of thousands of dollars at a time from special-interest groups and wealthy donors -- not us. We take in a few dollars here and there from grassroots supporters like you.
That means this campaign is about Tennesseans -- not special interests. It also means that we have to work twice as hard to reach goals and give our campaign steam.
[_**We have a lot of work to do if we 're going to send James to the Senate and take back the Majority. Rush in a contribution before the end-of-month deadline ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cd/18d6a294/4ce86527/26d63d53/1068739928/VEsB/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme191125?refcode=jme191125_m&amount=5&recurring=1")
Thanks and talk soon,
Sean

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Special Edition: Vote for which turkey President Trump pardons tomorrow!
body:
It’s that time of year again! President Donald J. Trump will continue a famous White House tradition tomorrow afternoon, choosing a turkey... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d6c6416f5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **Vote for which turkey President Trump should pardon tomorrow!**

**It’s that time of year** again! President Donald J. Trump will continue a famous White House tradition tomorrow afternoon, choosing a turkey to pardon as the official 2019 National Thanksgiving Turkey.

**This season’s** **feathered contestants** —Bread and Butter—arrived in Washington over the weekend. Both have been resting up at the Willard InterContinental Hotel in D.C., eagerly awaiting tomorrow’s ceremony in the White House Rose Garden.

**You get to decide** which bird President Trump will pardon. Be sure to cast your vote before the polls close at 11 a.m. ET tomorrow, November 26!
---
|
---
| [Vote Now](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b506ccd8e5&e=3ee4985eea "Vote Now")
---
| _*Note: While only one turkey will be honored as the National Thanksgiving Turkey, both will “retire” after tomorrow’s ceremony to Gobblers Rest, an exhibit at Virginia Tech where they can be visited by the public._
---
|
---
|
## **Watch: Hero dog ‘Conan’ visits the White House today**

**President Trump** , Vice President Mike Pence, and First Lady Melania Trump welcomed a very special guest to the White House today—“Conan,” perhaps the most famous and heroic dog in the country right now.

** ****Watch:** [Welcome to the White House, Conan!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df586f22bf&e=3ee4985eea)

**America’s newest hero** was instrumental in the operation that brought ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi to justice last month. Conan was injured during the raid but has made a full recovery and is already back to work.

**“Conan** came over from the Middle East—just arrived with some of the great people from the Special Forces” who helped take al-Baghdadi down, President Trump said.

**Our great military** service members and Conan “did a fantastic job,” the President added. “We are very honored to have Conan here.”
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence welcome Conan to the Oval Office** | November 25, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca5d3154d2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=522077949d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4269bafea7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Stephanie
subject: FWD: 39 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now?
We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now?
|
---
**Grassroots supporters like you are vital to our campaign, Friends.** That's why we want to make sure that you saw Stephanie's email last Friday. Rep. Chris Smith was first elected to Congress 39 years ago. That's 39 years of harmful policies attacking our fundamental human rights. **It's time for new leadership in this district for the first time in 39 years.[Can we count on you to chip in $39 to our campaign to elect Stephanie in 2020?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341b80/2590864390/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191125_em_nd")** \- Team Stephanie \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- Date: Friday, November 22
Re: 39 days
From: Stephanie Schmid

| | **Friends \-- [Will you donate $39 to help me get elected in 2020?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bbf/2590864390/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191125_em_link_nd_bottom&amount=39")** | **[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bbe/2590864390/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191125_em_button_nd_bottom&amount=39")**
---
I want to tell you why **39** means so much to me right now as I reflect on our campaign.
**I turned 39 years old about a month before I announced I was running for Congress.**
Never in my wildest imagination did I think I would run for office.
After law school and private practice, I joined the United States Foreign Service as a political officer working around the world to promote free and fair elections, strengthen democratic institutions, including political parties and legislative bodies, and defend human rights and the rule of law. I swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution and thought I would spend the rest of my life serving my country as a United States diplomat.
But after the November 2016 election, I was concerned about the strength of our own democratic institutions, including our electoral process, and I watched my beloved State Department and fellow Foreign Service Officers be attacked, dismissed, and undermined by this administration.
**Meanwhile, my opponent, Rep. Chris Smith, has been implementing harmful policies attacking our fundamental human rights over the past 39 years.**
What has he accomplished since he was elected in 1980? In a word: destruction.
He has championed the global gag rule, a draconian policy that blocks foreign non-governmental organizations, including healthcare providers who receive U.S. global health aid, from doing any work or advocacy related to abortion. Countless women have died due to unsafe abortions and thousands of their children have been orphaned because of this dangerous rule which gags healthcare professionals by preventing them from providing counseling and life-saving referrals to their patients. He has also voted against the Equality Act, the Violence Against Women Act, and worked to overturn _Roe_.
**Our next end of quarter deadline is in just 39 days.**
If we are going to beat Chris Smith, we need to kick our fundraising into full gear. We were only in the race for one month before our first end of quarter fundraising deadline and came _so close_ to out-fundraising our opponent. **I know if we all work together for the next 39 days, we can outraise Chris Smith in our first full quarter as a campaign.**
**So, ****friend****, can I count on you to chip in $39 to our campaign?**
Your donation will go directly to bringing new, fresh leadership to this district for the first time in 39 years.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bbd/2590864390/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191125_em_abx_25_nd")**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bbc/2590864390/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=39&refcode=20191125_em_abx_39_nd")**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bbb/2590864390/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191125_em_abx_50_nd")**
---
**[OR ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bba/2590864390/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191125_em_abx_other_nd&amount=39")**
---
Thank you,
Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff089/522d4087/7afceec9/4f341bb9/2590864390/VEsO/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

Peter —

Last week, we asked for 5,000 Democratic supporters to sign our petition to demand Kevin McCarthy and Congress vote to IMPEACH Trump.

[**Unfortunately, it doesn’t appear that you signed. Was that a mistake, Peter? Or, do you actually support Donald Trump??**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12231207/125579366/-33413499?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdjZTgyYy0wMDEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyddHyLmajL--tXUcBTAX2eyhQ6Mb0cW5TDWy8v-AV8=&emci=f94f22a7-fb0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ce7ce82c-0010-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10431999)

We are still 459 signatures short of our goal. We need to PROVE that the public is on our side to hold Trump accountable. But unless you sign, we’ll risk missing our goal before this petition closes.

[**Please, if you agree that no one -- not even the president -- is above the law, and that Trump MUST be impeached, add your name to this petition right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12231208/125579367/-33413499?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdjZTgyYy0wMDEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyddHyLmajL--tXUcBTAX2eyhQ6Mb0cW5TDWy8v-AV8=&emci=f94f22a7-fb0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ce7ce82c-0010-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10431999)
[This petition will close on Tuesday, November 26th, 2019.
Please, correct this error and sign our petition now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12231209/125579368/-33413499?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdjZTgyYy0wMDEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyddHyLmajL--tXUcBTAX2eyhQ6Mb0cW5TDWy8v-AV8=&emci=f94f22a7-fb0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ce7ce82c-0010-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10431999)

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: This is the movement we're building
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cba7/6cd27893/52f6bcf6/15879af1/1317703871/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Oregon's my home and I love it dearly. But this campaign isn't just about Oregon. Our **_movement_** is also about **_America _**-- and everyone who lives here. | [**Chip in $3 now and let's build this movement.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cba7/6cd27893/52f6bcf6/15879aee/1317703871/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-11-25-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
---
This movement is about **protecting our country** from people who want to take it backwards.
It's about standing up to the big drug and insurance companies so that every American has access to **quality, affordable health care**.
It's about **taking on the climate crisis** that's already harming so many people and protecting a healthy and prosperous future for our children, our grandchildren, and their children and grandchildren.
It's about **ensuring that our democracy works **-- that elections are won by those whom the people support, not the powerful, not the wealthy. (And that means abolishing the electoral college so that the candidate with the most votes wins.)
It's about **holding Donald Trump accountable** , and making sure that once we've ended the Trump presidency, we end hate-peddling Trumpism as well.
[**Donate $3 before the end of the month and let's build this movement to get America back on track.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cba7/6cd27893/52f6bcf6/15879aee/1317703871/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-11-25-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
**_Jeff_**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Hey Peter,

Senator Cornyn has already aired the first TV ads of this cycle AND amassed an $11 million war chest to spend on this race with the help of special interests.

**Unlike Senator Cornyn, MJ isn 't taking corporate PAC money, she's relying on grassroots donors like you. [Pitch in now to defeat Senator Cornyn.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098f/7f51f7bc/4b86fdb2/4ef08179/692197433/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191125.2nd__536__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**The average online donation powering this campaign is $21.** And 90% of our donations are under $100. MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar this grassroots team pitches in makes a huge difference. If everyone reading this chipped in our average online gift of $21 (or even half of that!) we'd keep up the momentum needed to defeat Senator Cornyn.

**[Can you donate $21, $10.50, or whatever you can to MJ's campaign to defeat Senator McConnell's henchman Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098f/7f51f7bc/4b86fdb2/4ef08179/692197433/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUzNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191125.2nd__536__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Senator John Cornyn isn 't wasting any time. Neither should we.**

Thank you! Your support makes this all possible.

\-- Leah Lacure
Digital Director, MJ for Texas

Hello,
Every month, we set fundraising goals. They're not arbitrary -- we arrive at them based on how invested Republicans are in flipping New Hampshire, and by looking at historical data for elections in the state.
Senator Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes and the goals we set are what we need to raise to stop Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell from unseating her and adding another seat to their Senate majority.
With five days to go, we're still short of our November goal. **We 're not so far off though -- if you could give $3 tonight, it would really help us get back on track. name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Are you at risk of losing your right to vote in Georgia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Check out our new tool and find out if you're in danger of being purged from the voting rolls. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ad/34a064cc/1b02da69/70367fe/2301174673/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is planning to purge over 300,000 voters from the rolls next month. **Your right to vote could be at risk.** [**So we created the Fair Fight Voter Purge Tool to help voters check if they are on the list and take the necessary steps to stay on the rolls. Enter your information and make sure your voting status is not at risk.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ad/34a064cc/1b02da69/70367ff/2301174673/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI1MTlWUFQtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE112519VPT-1-a") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ad/34a064cc/1b02da69/70367ff/2301174673/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI1MTlWUFQtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE112519VPT-1-a") You can check to see if you (or another voter) are on the list by entering your information into our new voter purge lookup tool: [**StopThePurge.com**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ad/34a064cc/1b02da69/70367ff/2301174673/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI1MTlWUFQtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/voter-purge?source=IE112519VPT-1-a") We can't let Brian Kemp's legacy of voter suppression continue on uninterrupted. Fair Fight is committed to holding the Secretary of State's office accountable. But doing so will take resources. If you can, chip in and help us keep up the fight to protect the right to vote. **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ad/34a064cc/1b02da69/70367fc/2301174673/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI1MTlWUFQtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112519VPT-1-a")** Thank you in advance, \- Team Fair Fight
